title: Ambient–PE bridge
summary: Records the coordinate change ρ = −r²/2, s = rt, the relation hᵣ = g(−r²/2), and the ambient cone decomposition.

mathematicalContent.heading: Coordinate change
mathematicalContent.body: The Fefferman–Graham normal coordinate ρ and the cone scale s are expressed in terms of the PE radius r and ambient homogeneity coordinate t.

mathematicalContent.heading: Boundary metric family
mathematicalContent.body: Under a supplied adapter between the FG metric field and PE metric symbols, the PE slice family hᵣ is the FG family gρ evaluated at ρ=−r²/2.

mathematicalContent.heading: Cone decomposition
mathematicalContent.body: After transporting the ambient metric to the cone coordinates, the intended relation is a Lorentzian radial term plus s² times the Poincaré metric.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines the ambient normal coordinate corresponding to a PE radius r.
Defines the cone coordinate s as the product of the PE radius r and ambient scale t.
correspondence.leanType: def coneScale (r t : Real) : Real := r * t

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The boundary r=0 corresponds to the ambient hypersurface ρ=0.
Unfolds the definition of the cone scale coordinate.
correspondence.leanType: theorem coneScale_eq_mul (r t : Real) : coneScale r t = r * t

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Packages a boundary identification, an adapter for FG metric fields, the equation hᵣ=g(−r²/2), coordinate functions t, ρ, and s satisfying ρ=−r²/2 and s=rt, formal ds² and ambient metric symbols, and the cone-decomposition equation.
correspondence.leanType: structure AmbientPEBridge (A : FG.NormalAmbientData Conf) (NF : PoincareNormalFormData X) where boundaryEquiv; boundaryMetricAdapter; hR_eq; ambientT; ambientRho; s; rho_coordinate_eq; s_coordinate_eq; dsSquared; ambientMetricInConeCoordinates; cone_decomposition

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Extracts the stored identification of the PE slice metric hᵣ with the adapted FG metric family at ρ=−r²/2.
correspondence.leanType: theorem boundary_family_from_ambient (B : AmbientPEBridge A NF) (r : Real) : NF.hR r = B.boundaryMetricAdapter (A.gRho (ambientRhoOfRadial r))

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Extracts the cone-decomposition equality stored in the bridge data.
correspondence.leanType: theorem ambient_metric_cone_decomposition (B : AmbientPEBridge A NF) : B.ambientMetricInConeCoordinates = add (scaleByScalar (-1) B.dsSquared) (scaleByFunction (fun z => (B.s z)^2) NF.metric.gPlus)

references.note: Source for the ambient-to-Poincaré coordinate change and cone relation.

limitations: The coordinate formulas are genuine definitions, but hR_eq and cone_decomposition are fields of AmbientPEBridge. The module does not construct the boundary equivalence or derive the transported metric identity from the FG normal form.
